methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $1.5B - $4.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 7.8x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.name: Ultima Genomics
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series C), post-money $4B

private.name: Insitro
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series C), post-money $2.4B

private.name: Colossal Biosciences
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series C), post-money $1.5B

data.narrative:
Tubulis, a Series C biotech and health company that has raised €436M+, is evaluated against a peer universe of 3 public-market comparables (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private peers in the same sector and stage.

The peer-median method is the primary applicable valuation approach. Three same-stage, same-sector private comparables—Ultima Genomics ($4.0B), Insitro ($2.4B), and Colossal Biosciences ($1.5B)—yield a median valuation of $2.4B. This range spans from $1.5B to $4.0B across the peer set. Public-comp anchoring cannot be applied; while the Biotech & Health sector trades at a median price-to-sales multiple of 7.8x across the three public tickers, Tubulis's revenue is not on file, as is typical for private-stage companies.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $2.0B to $2.8B, centered on the peer median of $2.4B. This implies a +/-15% band around the median. Key uncertainties include the lack of stage-specific revenue or unit economics data for Tubulis itself, which would enable revenue-multiple or burn-multiple cross-checks. The peer set, while appropriately filtered by stage and sector, is limited to three data points. Further refinement would benefit from disclosure of pipeline maturity, cash position, and burn rate relative to runway.
